title: melica scandens
intro: Melica scandens, also known as climbing melic grass or climbing melic, is a perennial grass that grows in the mountainous regions of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Melica scandens include the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in traditional medicine to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant is typically prepared for use through herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken orally as capsules, or applied topically to the skin for its various health benefits.
